debug_info.goal:
case some.some.none
𝕜 : Type u_3
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
f g : α → 𝕜
p q : NNReal
hr₀ : none ≠ 0
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p) (some q) none
⊢ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[none] ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[some p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[some q]

failed_attempts:
exfalso
    simp only [ENNReal.add_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_top, ENNReal.inv_eq_zero, false_or] at hpqr
  · have hpr : (r : ℝ≥0∞) ≠ 0 := ENNReal.coe_ne_zero.2 hr₀
    have hconj : (p / r : ℝ≥0∞).HolderConjugate (q / r) := by
      simp only [ENNReal.HolderConjugate, ENNReal.coe_div (NNReal.coe_ne_zero.2 hr₀), ENNReal.div_eq_inv_mul,
        ← ENNReal.mul_add, hpqr.1, ENNReal.mul_inv_cancel hpr ENNReal.coe_ne_top]
    rw [← ENNReal.rpow_le_rpow_iff (NNReal.coe_pos.2 <| pos_iff_ne_zero.2 hr₀), ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_nonneg _ _ (zero_le _)]
    convert wInner_cWeight_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm (↑(p / r)) (↑(q / r)) using 1
    · simp only [wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hr₀, NNReal.coe_mul, NNReal.coe_rpow,
        norm_mul, mul_rpow]
    · simp only [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hconj.1.ne_zero, cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hconj.2.ne_zero,
        cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm (mul_ne_zero hconj.1.ne_zero hpr),
        cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm (mul_ne_zero hconj.2.ne_zero hpr),
        norm_norm, norm_rpow_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg _), NNReal.coe_div (NNReal.coe_ne_zero.2 hr₀),
        NNReal.rpow_rpow, ← mul_div_assoc, mul_comm _ (r : ℝ), mul_div_cancel₀ _ (NNReal.coe_ne_zero.2 hr₀)]
simpa using hpqr.inv_add_inv
simpa using hpqr.inv_add_inv

exfalso
    have h := hpqr.inv_add_inv
    simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, ENNReal.add_eq_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_zero] at h
    exact ENNReal.coe_ne_top _ h.1

simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, ENNReal.add_eq_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_top,
      false_and] at hpqr
  have hr : 0 < r := pos_iff_ne_zero.2 hr₀
  have : (p / r : ℝ≥0∞).HolderConjugate (q / r) := by
    constructor
    rw [ENNReal.div_eq_inv_mul, ENNReal.div_eq_inv_mul, ← ENNReal.mul_add, hpqr.inv_add_inv,
      ENNReal.inv_mul_cancel (pos_iff_ne_zero.1 hr).ne' ENNReal.coe_ne_top]
  calc
    ‖f * g‖ₙ_[r] = ‖fun i ↦ ‖f i‖ ^ (r : ℝ) * ‖g i‖ ^ (r : ℝ)‖ₙ_[1] ^ (r⁻¹ : ℝ) := by
      rw [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hr₀, cL1Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm]
      simp only [norm_mul, NNReal.mul_rpow, abs_of_nonneg (NNReal.zero_le_coe _)]
    _ ≤ (‖fun i ↦ ‖f i‖ ^ (r : ℝ)‖ₙ_[p / r] * ‖fun i ↦ ‖g i‖ ^ (r : ℝ)‖ₙ_[q / r]) ^ (r⁻¹ : ℝ) := by
      gcongr
      rw [cL1Norm_mul_of_nonneg]
      · exact wInner_cWeight_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm (p / r) (q / r)
      all_goals intros; positivity
    _ = ‖f‖ₙ_[p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[q] := by
      rw [NNReal.mul_rpow]
      congr 1 <;>
      · rw [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm, cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm]
        · simp only [NNReal.abs_rpow_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg _), ← NNReal.rpow_mul]
          congr 1
          simp only [ENNReal.coe_div, ENNReal.coe_coe]
          rw [div_mul_cancel₀ _ hr.ne', div_div, mul_comm, div_mul_cancel₀ _ hr.ne']
        all_goals simp [hr.ne', ENNReal.coe_ne_top]

have := hpqr.1
    simp at this
    contradiction

simp [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.add_eq_zero] at hpqr
  have hr : 0 < r := pos_iff_ne_zero.2 hr₀
  have hp : 0 < p := by by_contra hp; simp [hp, ENNReal.HolderTriple] at hpqr
  have hq : 0 < q := by by_contra hq; simp [hq, ENNReal.HolderTriple] at hpqr
  have : (p / r : ℝ≥0∞).HolderConjugate (q / r) := by
    rw [ENNReal.HolderConjugate, ENNReal.div_eq_inv_mul, ENNReal.div_eq_inv_mul, ENNReal.mul_inv,
      ENNReal.mul_inv, inv_inv, inv_inv, ← ENNReal.mul_add, hpqr.1, ENNReal.mul_inv_cancel]
    · simp [ENNReal.coe_ne_top]
    · simpa using hr.ne'
  rw [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hr₀, cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm (by simpa using hp.ne'),
    cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm (by simpa using hq.ne'), ← NNReal.rpow_le_rpow_iff hr,
    NNReal.mul_rpow, ← NNReal.rpow_mul, ← NNReal.rpow_mul]
  simp only [inv_mul_cancel hr.ne', nnnorm_mul, NNReal.mul_rpow, NNReal.rpow_one,
    wInner_cWeight_eq_expect]
  refine (wInner_cWeight_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm (f := fun i ↦ ‖f i‖ ^ (r : ℝ))
    (g := fun i ↦ ‖g i‖ ^ (r : ℝ)) (p / r) (q / r)).trans_eq ?_
  congr 2 <;>
    simp only [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm (by simp [div_eq_inv_mul, hp.ne', hq.ne', hr.ne']),
      NNReal.coe_rpow, NNReal.coe_nnnorm, norm_of_nonneg (NNReal.coe_nonneg _),
      ENNReal.coe_div r.coe_ne_zero] <;>
    simp [div_eq_inv_mul, ENNReal.mul_rpow_of_nonneg, ENNReal.rpow_mul]

have h := hpqr.inv_add_inv
    simp only [ENNReal.add_eq_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_top, false_and] at h
    contradiction
simp [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.inv_eq_zero] at hpqr; contradiction
simpa [ENNReal.HolderTriple] using hpqr

have := hpqr.inv_add_inv
    simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, ENNReal.add_eq_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_top,

have := hpqr.inv_add_inv

cases hpqr
    simp_all
  sorry

    simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, ENNReal.add_eq_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_top,
      false_and] at h
    exact h.elim

simp [ENNReal.HolderTriple.def] at hpqr
    contradiction

rcases hpqr with ⟨h⟩
    simp only [ENNReal.inv_top, ENNReal.add_eq_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_top,
      false_and] at h
    cases h

cases hpqr
    simp [ENNReal.add_eq_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_top] at *
    contradiction

simp only [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.add_eq_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_top,
      false_and] at hpqr
  simp only [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm]
  have hr : 0 < (r : ℝ) := by
    refine (ENNReal.toReal_pos (by positivity) ?_).trans_eq r.coe_toReal
    simp only [ne_eq, ENNReal.coe_eq_zero, hr₀, not_false_eq_true]
  rw [← NNReal.rpow_le_rpow_iff (inv_pos.2 hr), NNReal.mul_rpow, ← NNReal.rpow_mul,
    ← NNReal.rpow_mul, mul_inv_cancel₀ hr.ne', NNReal.rpow_one]
  simp only [nnnorm_mul, NNReal.mul_rpow]
  rw [← cL1Norm_eq_expect_nnnorm, cL1Norm_mul_of_nonneg (by positivity) (by positivity)]
  refine (wInner_cWeight_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm (p / r) (q / r)).trans_eq ?_
  · simp only [ENNReal.isConjugateExponent_iff_inv_add_inv_eq_one, ENNReal.coe_div hr.ne',
      ENNReal.div_eq_inv_mul, ENNReal.inv_mul, ENNReal.inv_inv]
    norm_cast
    have hp : p ≠ 0 := by rintro rfl; simp [ENNReal.coe_ne_top] at hpqr
    have hq : q ≠ 0 := by rintro rfl; simp [ENNReal.coe_ne_top] at hpqr
    rw [← mul_add, ← ENNReal.coe_inv hp, ← ENNReal.coe_inv hq, hpqr,
      ENNReal.coe_inv hr.ne', mul_inv_cancel₀ hr.ne']
  · simp only [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm, nnnorm_rpow, nnnorm_norm, NNReal.rpow_rpow,
      div_mul_cancel₀ _ hr.ne']
simpa using hpqr.inv_add_inv
simpa [ENNReal.add_eq_zero] using hpqr.inv_add_inv_conj
simpa using hpqr.inv_add_inv
simpa [ENNReal.add_eq_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_zero] using hpqr.inv_add_inv

simp only [ENNReal.top_inv, ENNReal.add_eq_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_zero, ENNReal.coe_ne_top,
      and_false] at hpqr; contradiction
  simp only [ENNReal.some_eq_coe] at hpqr hr₀ ⊢
  have hr : 0 < r := pos_iff_ne_zero.2 hr₀
  have hp : 0 < p := by
    rw [pos_iff_ne_zero]; intro h; simp [h, ENNReal.inv_zero] at hpqr
  have hq : 0 < q := by
    rw [pos_iff_ne_zero]; intro h; simp [h, ENNReal.inv_zero] at hpqr
  have : (p / r : ℝ≥0∞).HolderConjugate (q / r) := by
    rw [ENNReal.HolderConjugate, ← ENNReal.coe_div hr.ne', ← ENNReal.coe_div hr.ne',
      ← ENNReal.coe_one]
    congr 1
    rw [ENNReal.HolderTriple, ENNReal.some_eq_coe, ENNReal.coe_inv hp.ne',
      ENNReal.coe_inv hq.ne', ENNReal.coe_inv hr.ne', ← NNReal.coe_add, NNReal.coe_inj] at hpqr
    field_simp [hp.ne', hq.ne', hr.ne'] at hpqr ⊢
    linarith
  rw [← NNReal.rpow_le_rpow_iff hr, NNReal.mul_rpow, cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hr.ne']
  rw [← NNReal.coe_le_coe, NNReal.coe_expect]
  push_cast
  refine (wInner_cWeight_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm (f := fun i ↦ ‖f i‖ ^ (r : ℝ))
    (g := fun i ↦ ‖g i‖ ^ (r : ℝ)) (p / r) (q / r)).trans_eq ?_
  simp only [cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hp.ne', cLpNorm_eq_expect_nnnorm hq.ne',
    wInner_cWeight_eq_expect, NNReal.coe_rpow, NNReal.coe_mul, NNReal.coe_expect]
  push_cast
  congr 1
  · congr; ext; simp [NNReal.mul_rpow, abs_of_nonneg (norm_nonneg _)]
  · simp only [Real.norm_of_nonneg (Real.rpow_nonneg (norm_nonneg _) _),
      ← Real.rpow_mul (norm_nonneg _), div_mul_div_cancel_right₀ hr.ne']
simpa [ENNReal.add_eq_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_zero] using hpqr.inv_add_inv

simpa only [ENNReal.inv_top, ENNReal.add_eq_zero, ENNReal.inv_eq_zero,
      ENNReal.coe_ne_top, false_and] using hpqr.inv_add_inv
successful_attempts:
rcases hpqr with ⟨h⟩
    simp at h
